query:
SELECT 
  g.id as game_id,
  g.awayTeam,
  g.homeTeam,
  g.startTimeEst,
  l.awayPitcherName,
  l.awayPitcherMlbamId,
  l.homePitcherName,
  l.homePitcherMlbamId,
  l.awayLineupConfirmed,
  l.homeLineupConfirmed
FROM games g
LEFT JOIN mlb_lineups l ON l.gameId = g.id
WHERE g.sport = 'MLB' AND g.gameDate = '2026-03-26'
ORDER BY g.startTimeEst ASC;

  l.awayLineupConfirmed,

FROM games g
LEFT JOIN mlb_lineups l ON l.gameId = g.id
WHERE g.sport = 'MLB' AND g.gameDate = '2026-03-26'
ORDER BY g.startTimeEst ASC;
